title: clinopodium barbatum
intro: Clinopodium barbatum, also known as bearded calamint, is a flowering plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium barbatum include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and headaches, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Clinopodium barbatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
